task_completion.visual_evidence: A new email composition window is open within the BlueMail application.
The 'Subject' field contains exactly 'Weekly Discussion Digest'.

task_completion.description: Include the bolded header in the email body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Top Discussions' appears at the top of the email body and is visually formatted as bold.

task_completion.description: Include a bulleted list of at least three email subjects
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body contains a formatted bulleted list with at least 3 distinct items that appear to be email subject lines.

task_completion.description: Include the italicized footer in the email body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Compiled by AI Assistant' appears at the bottom of the email body and is visually formatted as italicized.

task_completion.description: Save the completed email as a draft
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email is seen in the 'Drafts' folder of BlueMail, or there is a visual indicator/toast notification showing the draft was saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the BlueMail GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the BlueMail interface being actively used (e.g., cursor in text fields, formatting toolbar visible) rather than a terminal window or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the rich text editor for formatting rather than typing raw HTML tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text appears bolded, italicized, and bulleted in the editor visually, rather than showing raw HTML tags like <b>, <i>, or <ul> typed out as plain text.

integrity.description: The bulleted list contains actual email subjects rather than generic placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The list items look like real email subjects (e.g., from the SpamAssassin corpus) rather than placeholder text like 'Email 1', 'Subject 2', or 'Test'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected recipient is exactly 'digest-subscribers@community.org'. The expected subject is exactly 'Weekly Discussion Digest'. The email body must contain the exact bold header 'Top Discussions', an exact italicized footer 'Compiled by AI Assistant', and a bulleted list with a minimum of 3 items.
